caption: A man with a shaved head, a dark beard, and tattoos on his right arm is positioned in a recording studio, wearing a white t-shirt and black over-ear headphones. He is situated in front of a professional condenser microphone mounted on a boom arm, which features the text " Rode NT1-A" on its side. The background consists of black acoustic foam panels with a vertical ribbed texture. As the sequence progresses, the man is speaking and gesturing, his facial expressions shifting from a wide-eyed, surprised look to a more composed expression. His mouth moves and his gaze shifts slightly as he interacts with someone off-screen. The camera remains static throughout the sequence, focusing on his head and shoulders while he continues to speak into the microphone.
